assertions.text: Identifies that Thai locale uses Buddhist calendar by default (year = Gregorian + 543)
assertions.evidence: States Thai locale uses Buddhist calendar, year is Gregorian plus 543 so 2025 becomes 2568

assertions.text: Distinguishes: for API output use en_US_POSIX locale, for display use .dateStyle
assertions.evidence: Shows decision tree: API/server = en_US_POSIX, user display = .dateStyle or Date.formatted()

assertions.text: For display to Thai users, the Buddhist year IS correct — only server communication needs Gregorian
assertions.evidence: Explicitly states: Buddhist year 2568 IS correct for Thai users, only server communication needs Gregorian
